variant: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

request.message: give me an 8-week minoxidil timeline, week by week

response_body.response: don't see a week-by-week minoxidil timeline in your current docs. the evidence just says "results take several months of consistency", but no specific breakdown. here's what i can give you based on general minoxidil protocol:  key: minoxidil needs 3–4 months minimum to show results. 8 weeks is the foundation phase. if you're also running finasteride or dermarolling, stack them from week 1 for synergy. before you start any of this, talk to a doctor, especially at 16.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.
